profile.name: Tanapon Yurawan
profile.intro: I am a software developer with a strong interest and expertise in Full-stack Development, Automation Systems, and Cybersecurity.

projects.title: Computer Science Testing & Evaluation Hub
description: Built a scalable online coding exam platform featuring real-time automated evaluation.
Integrated Judge0 and Monaco Editor to support 5+ programming languages.
Engineered live leaderboards and concurrent execution using Docker, PostgreSQL, and Redis.

projects.title: Credential Deduplication Automation
description: Reduced CloudSEK report processing time from 30+ minutes to under 1 minute.
Developed a full-stack automation pipeline via n8n and PostgreSQL upsert logic, eliminating manual duplication across thousands of records.

projects.title: SOC Alert Monitoring Dashboard
description: Centralized security alerts into an n8n dashboard using CrowdStrike APIs.
Streamlined incident triage and significantly reduced manual lookup time across SOC workflows.

projects.title: Automated Task Notification System
description: Engineered an n8n and Slack workflow polling REST APIs every 2 hours to auto-tag assignees for overdue tasks.
Boosted team accountability and eliminated missed deadlines.

projects.title: Web Vulnerability Pentesting
description: Identified 20+ vulnerabilities (Broken Access Control, XSS, Parameter Tampering) via grey-box penetration testing.
Delivered severity-graded remediation reports with clear mitigation guidance.
